---
title: "Tutorial for merging satellite-based precipitation datasets with ground observations using RFmerge (>=0.3-0) - link"
author:
- "Mauricio Zambrano-Bigiarini^[mauricio.zambrano@ufrontera.cl]"
- "Oscar M. Baez-Villanueva^[oscar.baezvillanueva@ugent.be]"
- "Juan Diego Giraldo-Osorio"
- Ian McNamara
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
  pdf_document:
    number_sections: true
vignette: |
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Tutorial for merging satellite-based precipitation datasets with ground observations using `RFmerge`} 
  %\VignetteKeyword{hydrology}
  %\VignetteKeyword{hydrological modelling}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown} 
---

A tutorial for using `RFmerge`  to create an improved precipitation dataset by combining two different satellite-based precipitation products with ground-based observations and user-selected covariates (i.e., digital elevation model and Euclidean distances to rain gauge stations) can be found in the package website:

[*RFmerge-RainfallExample-full**](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20061104)
